channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Zip Car Parking Spaces no longer in use, 21st March
item.description:
Zip Car no longer operates in London but the parking bays are taking up well needed parking spaces when half of Ridge Road is closed for Thames Water works.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Albany Road, Stroud Green, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Road markings too faint, 21st March
item.description:
The road markings on this stretch of Erith Road are barely visible at night. Traffic coming down the hill (direction of Erith to Bexleyheath) are tending to drive more to the middle of the road, often crossing the central line - we live nearby and have had many near misses recently - probably because they can't clearly see where each side of the road is/should be defined by the road markings.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 388, Erith Road, Barnehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: URGENT: Sewage Flooding Pavement – Public Health Risk, 21st March
item.description:
I am reporting a sewage pipe leak that has been flooding the pavement for several weeks with no council response. This is a serious public health hazard. Children are playing in the area and stepping through contaminated water daily. With warmer weather approaching, the risk will increase rapidly. Urgent inspection, repair, and sanitisation is needed immediately.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Clayton Road, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Damaged Electric Sub Station gate., 21st March
item.description:
The gate on the Electric Sub Station is damaged.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 29, Court Road, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Light not working, 21st March
item.description:
Light not working

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 2,4, Wynford Grove, St Paul's Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: In near the bushes, 21st March
item.description:
A baby fox is dead near the bushes looks like it been a hit by a car
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Shooters Hill, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Household items and broken glass, 21st March
item.description:
Lots of items and food, but also a lot of broken glass on the pavement and road. It has been here for a few days now. The glass is a particular worry as many children walk here to school daily. Thank you!

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Holmdale Terrace, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bollard on island at traffic lights on Chislehurst High street (junction with Park Rd/Willow Grove) has been knocked onto the floor, 21st March
item.description:
Bollard on island at traffic lights located on Chislehurst High street (junction with Park Rd/Willow Grove) has been knocked onto the floor and needs reinstatement or replacement.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 53, High Street, Chislehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Recycling out days early, 21st March
item.description:
Local residents fly tip this area 7 days a week - ongoing and encourages fly tipping an untidiness in the general area

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Smalley Close, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Restaurant outdoor seating at 1 Broadway Market obstructing pavement., 21st March
item.description:
Restaurant has placed outdoor seating too close to the permanent street furniture, leaving barely enough space for one person to walk through.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Broadway Market, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Streetlight 100/H18 on Chislehurst High St, BR7 is not working., 21st March
item.description:
Streetlight 100/H18 on Chislehurst High St, BR7 is not working.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): High Street, Chislehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Mature tree covered in ivy which seems to be affecting its growth, 21st March
item.description:
It's a bigger job that I could or should deal with
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bramerton Road, Elmers End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Light flickering all night, 21st March
item.description:
Further to FixMyStreet reference 8457385, I note that a new light (No. 150) has been installed. Please replace/repair the light situated between #65-67. This light is currently illuminated during the day and flickers throughout the night. Thank you.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Redwald Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Christchurch Way with Derwent street needs more regular cleaning, 21st March
item.description:
The street is constantly dirty. Compared with other areas in the borough, this is one of the worst areas by far. This is constantly reported by neighbours in many facebook groups too.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Christchurch Way, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Usual pile of rubbish, 21st March
item.description:
This has been here for weeks now.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): King and Queen Street, Walworth, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned car, 21st March
item.description:
Been there for several months

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Homefield Road, Widmore, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Uneven paving, 21st March
item.description:
Uneven paving causing a dangerous trip hazard.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Conifer Gardens, Streatham Hill, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree in need of pruning ,, 21st March
item.description:
Tree in need of pruning , far to big and seems like a long time since it was done and when it leaf it over hangs the road . please can this be actioned.Thank you
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Oxhawth Crescent, Petts Wood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Uneven pavement, 21st March
item.description:
Uneven paving slab causing a dangerous trip hazard.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1-18, Ingram Close, Lambeth, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish emptied from a van. Last night?, 21st March
item.description:
Rubbish emptied from a van
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Murchison Avenue, Albany Park, Greater London
